summary: Backend testing for unified gallery creation across session types (Live, On-Demand, Bookings). All 12 tests passed. Verified watermark settings endpoints, surfer selection preference endpoints, end-session/dispatch/booking complete endpoints, and scheduler job registration.
critical_code_review_comments: gallery_sync.py service is well-implemented with proper pricing logic for each session type (live, on_demand, booking)
Scheduler job selection_deadline_expiry is properly registered at 4am UTC with correct logic for auto-select vs forfeit
All endpoints return correct 404 for non-existent resources
Watermark settings endpoint correctly includes new default_watermark_in_selection field
Idempotency checks in place via check_gallery_exists_for_session() to prevent duplicate galleries
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test photographer account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All gallery sync features are working correctly. The photographer profile ID (not user_id) should be used for photographer endpoints. Watermark settings, selection preference, and deadline-info endpoints all return correct responses. Scheduler has 11 jobs including the new selection_deadline_expiry job at 4am UTC.

TestPhotographerWatermarkSettings.test_get_watermark_settings: PASSED - Returns watermark_style, watermark_text, watermark_opacity, watermark_position, default_watermark_in_selection

TestEndSessionGalleryCreation.test_end_session_no_active_session: PASSED - Returns 400 with 'No active session to end'

TestSchedulerJobRegistration.test_scheduler_info_endpoint: PASSED - Verified 11 scheduler jobs including selection_deadline_expiry at 4am UTC

verified_features: POST /api/photographer/{id}/end-session - creates gallery via gallery_sync service with live session pricing
POST /api/dispatch/{id}/complete - marks dispatch as COMPLETED and creates gallery with on-demand pricing
POST /api/bookings/{id}/complete - marks booking as Completed and creates gallery with booking pricing
GET /api/photographer/{id}/watermark-settings - returns watermark settings including default_watermark_in_selection
PUT /api/photographer/{id}/watermark-settings - updates watermark settings including default_watermark_in_selection
GET /api/surfer-gallery/selection-queue/{id}/deadline-info - returns deadline info and preference status
Scheduler job selection_deadline_expiry registered at 4am UTC
